citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall.
The application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

details: Created separate cards for source evidence, atomic card design, semantic index recall, and application database ownership of lifecycle/conflict state.
